basic_details.job_title: District Court Jagatsinghpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Typist, Stenographer and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Grade-III, Driver

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Upper age limit relaxed for reserved categories as per Odisha District and Civil Courts’ Judicial Staff Services (Method of Recruitment & Conditions of Service) Rules, 2008 and Amendments.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Computer Application from recognized institute
qualification.details: Junior Clerk-Cum-Copyist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute; able to speak, read, and write Odia. Junior Typist: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute; minimum speed of 40 words per minute in typewriting in English through Computer; able to speak, read, and write Odia. Stenographer Grade-III: Passed at least +3 examination or equivalent from a recognized university; Diploma in Computer Application from a recognized institute; minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in typewriting per minute in English through Computer; able to speak, read, and write Odia. Driver: Passed Higher Secondary School Certificate examination (10+2) or equivalent; valid driving licence for Light Motor Vehicle; knowledge of motor mechanism; experience of driving motor car for at least three years; able to read, write, and speak Odia.

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-Cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Driver: Level-4 (Rs.19,900-63,200/-) Per Month Stenographer Grade-III: Level-7 (Rs.25,500-81,100/-) Per Month

selection_process: Written Test Computer Science Test (Practical) Type-Writing Test / Shorthand & Type-Writing Test Trade Test Viva-Voce Test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Jagatsinghpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jagatsinghpur.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download District Court Jagatsinghpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment is 21st June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies announced for various posts including Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Grade-III, and Driver in the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit to apply for these posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post. Generally, candidates need at least a +3 examination or equivalent, a Diploma in Computer Application, and specific typing or shorthand skills for certain roles. The Driver post requires 10+2 and a valid driving license.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by the District Court Jagatsinghpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900 to Rs. 81,100 per month, depending on the post. Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, and Driver posts fall under Level-4, while Stenographer Grade-III is under Level-7.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the District Court Jagatsinghpur recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The available posts are Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, Stenographer Grade-III, and Driver. Each post has specific eligibility criteria and responsibilities.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these government jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, Computer Science Test (Practical), Type-Writing Test / Shorthand & Type-Writing Test, Trade Test, and a Viva-Voce Test, depending on the post applied for.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Court Jagatsinghpur, which is https://jagatsinghpur.dcourts.gov.in. Links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
